reasoning: The Lean statement captures all the informal hypotheses: X is a topological space with `CompactSpace` and `T2Space` (compact Hausdorff), X1 and X2 are closed subsets via `IsClosed`, their union is `univ` (i.e., all of X), and each is metrizable via `MetrizableSpace` (which, for `Set X`, uses the subspace topology—matching "closed subspace").
